title: Café Ride with Purpose
description: Social endurance ride with structured blocks

coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Just go easy and stay comfortable. Your aerobic system will thank you later.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building your aerobic foundation. Consistency is key.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Fat oxidation zone - maximize mitochondrial efficiency at low intensity.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Keep it easy, maintain steady pace, build aerobic base.

coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This is the sweet spot where discomfort meets sustainability. You can do this.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is muscular endurance work. You're getting stronger with every interval.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Sustained tempo develops lactate threshold buffering capacity.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Steady, controlled effort. Feel the burn but maintain power.
